globalNews.title: US and Iran begin talks on initial peace deal in Switzerland
globalNews.summary: The face-to-face meeting follows ongoing fighting in Lebanon and Iran's claim to have shut the Strait of Hormuz.

globalNews.title: Fuel sales halted in occupied Crimea as Ukraine targets oil facilities
globalNews.summary: Fuel had already been rationed due to shortages caused by Kyiv's attacks against supply routes in Russian-occupied territories.

globalNews.title: Colombia's escalating, brutal internal conflict is defining its presidential election
globalNews.summary: A left-wing senator who backs talks with armed gangs faces an outsider endorsed by Trump.

globalNews.title: France bans alcohol at music festival events under red heatwave alert
globalNews.summary: Annual street parties attended by millions ordered to help “preserve” healthcare services in 40C (104F) heat.

globalNews.title: Former Olympian denies vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool after arrest
globalNews.summary: Davey Hearn says he was simply touching the new paint at the site out of curiosity and did not remove or alter it.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin tipped for $66K top as trader flags 'suspicious' BTC price gains
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin pushed for a $64,000 reclaim despite the US-Iran war making a partial comeback and Binance spot sellers keeping up pressure from earlier in the week.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price may hit $24K if US stock market crashes by 50%, analyst warns
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.

cryptoNews.title: Dash eyes Philippines as market for crypto payments
cryptoNews.summary: Dash is assessing the Philippines for a crypto payments push as regulators promote easier business registration, though industry participants say compliant market entry can still take years.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price is down over 40% since STRC launched: Is Strategy 'fine'?
cryptoNews.summary: STRC’s slide below par has emboldened critics, slowed Strategy’s Bitcoin buys and sparked debate over whether Michael Saylor’s BTC flywheel is still fine.

cryptoNews.title: Japanese corporate pension fund plans 1% crypto allocation: Nikkei
cryptoNews.summary: A Japanese corporate pension fund with about 1,200 participating small and medium-sized businesses plans to allocate roughly 1% of its assets to crypto.

aiNews.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
aiNews.summary: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.

aiNews.title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
aiNews.summary: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”

aiNews.title: In the Weights is your new AI-centric vanity search
aiNews.summary: So ... what's your In the Weights score?

aiNews.title: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for rival Anthropic
aiNews.summary: Jumper isn't the only big name leaving Google DeepMind.

aiNews.title: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn’t stop anyone
aiNews.summary: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.

economicCalendar.description: Monthly jobs report - employment and wage data
